title: turnera stipularis
intro: Turnera stipularis, also known as the Yellow Passionflower, is a plant species belonging to the Turnera genus. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and inflammation. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Turnera stipularis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances.
